caption: The video shows a recording of a computer screen displaying a webpage from the IRS website. The top of the page features the IRS logo and links for "SEARCH", "HELP", and "MENU". The main content focuses on "RMD Calculations and 50% tax on missed distributions", explaining that an IRA trustee or plan administrator must report or calculate the required minimum distribution. It states, "Not taking a required distribution, or not withdrawing enough, could mean a 50% excise tax on the amount not distributed," and mentions that the IRS has "worksheets" to help with calculations. A section titled "Inherited IRAs" is also visible. As the video progresses, the user scrolls down the page, causing the text to move upward and revealing more information about inherited IRAs. A mouse cursor is visible on the screen, moving slightly as the user navigates the content.
